title: Lists & Array Math Coding
description: Coding challenges for list manipulation, running sum computation, and basic statistics.
subject: Programming

content.prompt:
You are given a list of items on the first input line (comma-separated). Read the list, then:
1. Print the total number of items
2. Print the first and last item
3. Add 'Milk' to the end and print the updated list (comma-separated)
content.starterCode:
# TODO: Read items as a comma-separated string and split into a list
items_str = input("Enter items: ")
items = items_str.split(",")

# TODO: Print total count
# TODO: Print first and last item
# TODO: Add 'Milk' and print updated list comma-separated

testCases.expected:
Total items: 3
First: Bread
Last: Cheese
Updated: Bread,Eggs,Cheese,Milk

Total items: 1
First: Apple
Last: Apple
Updated: Apple,Milk

content.prompt:
Read a list of integers (space-separated). Compute the running sum where each element becomes the sum of all elements up to that index. Print the running sum list space-separated.
Example: [1, 2, 3, 4] → [1, 3, 6, 10]
content.starterCode:
# TODO: Read space-separated integers
nums = list(map(int, input("Enter numbers: ").split()))

# TODO: Compute running sum
# running[i] = sum of nums[0..i]

# TODO: Print the running sum list space-separated
